name: Padysaurus Pizza Pockets
recipeIngredient: 2.5 ounces fully cooked pastrami, thinly sliced
2.5 ounces full cooked ham, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine 2 1/4 cups flour, yeast, sugar and salt. Add water and butter; mix well. Add enough remaining flour to form a soft dough.
2. Turn onto a floured surface; knead for 4 minutes.
3. Roll dough into a 14x10-inch rectangle. Cut with a 3-inch round cookie cutter. Reroll scraps to cut a total of 24 circles.
4. Place 1 teaspoon pizza sauce and a slice of pepperoni in the center of 12 circles.
5. Combine pastrami, ham and cheese; place equal amounts over pepperoni. Add up to half a teaspoon of pizza sauce, if desired.
6. Cover with remaining dough circles; pinch edges or press with a fork to seal.
7. Place on greased baking sheets. Brush with egg.
8. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes, or until browned.
